header.headline: Sentencepiece Algorithm
header.subtitle: SentencePiece needs a deterministic pipeline view from raw text to selected subword units.

stage_1.title: Input Text
stage_1.body: Sentencepiece Algorithm begins with a text surface whose boundaries must stay explicit.

stage_2.title: Candidate Split
stage_2.body: The system generates candidate pieces or structures before picking one stable path.

stage_3.title: Rule / Merge
stage_3.body: Rules or merge structures decide which candidate becomes the emitted token path.

stage_4.title: Token Emission
stage_4.body: The final stage emits pieces or ids that downstream runtime code will trust exactly.

left.title: Tokenizer Surface
left.body: Expose the visible boundary markers, prefix paths, or candidate pieces.

right.title: Emission Result
right.body: Connect the rule choice to the final emitted pieces or lookup path.

footer.note: Sentencepiece Algorithm belongs in the broader contract because the model needs dense technical layouts, not only charts and posters.
